title.en: Tapestry of the Terra: Mineral Veins

description.ko: 광물 매장지와 침식 패턴의 복잡한 교차를 강조하며 지구의 자연적 예술성을 고도에서 바라본 숨막히는 풍경입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking high-altitude perspective of Earth's natural artistry, highlighting the complex intersection of mineral deposits and erosion patterns.

prompt: Top-down satellite view of intricate geological textures, cracked dry lake beds intersecting with turquoise mineral veins and red clay deposits, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, detailed erosion patterns.
